body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
When we run with oceananigans, we place the land model at the poles since the ocean's lat/lon grid only goes from 80 N to 80 S. However because the land’s cubed sphere grid doesn't align with latitudes, we end up with gaps where there is no surface model.

This PR extends the polar land mass to 78 degrees to make sure it overlaps with the ocean/sea ice. This isn't a great solution as it could still fail for high enough land resolution, but it seems to work for 16 h_elem with n poly 3. We will switch to the tripolar grid for ocean soon (hopefully next week), so we won't need to keep this fix for long


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete

-->

title: extend polar cap to 78 degrees
